# Paint Color HQ

> Paint Color HQ is a free tool for matching paint colors across 14 major brands including Sherwin-Williams, Benjamin Moore, Behr, Valspar, and PPG. It provides cross-brand color matching using Delta E 2000, a room visualizer, photo color identifier, palette generator, and paint calculator.

## Key Data

- 25,000+ paint colors from 14 brands
- Cross-brand matches calculated using CIEDE2000 (Delta E 2000)
- Each color includes: hex code, RGB values, LRV (Light Reflectance Value), undertone, and color family
- Match quality: Delta E < 1 = exact match, < 2 = very close, < 3 = close, < 5 = near match

## Brands Covered

Sherwin-Williams, Benjamin Moore, Behr, Valspar, PPG, Dunn-Edwards, Vista Paint, Hirshfields, MPC, KILZ, RAL, Farrow & Ball, Colorhouse, Dutch Boy

## Useful Pages

- /brands — Browse all 14 paint brands
- /brands/{brand-slug} — Browse all colors for a specific brand
- /colors/{brand-slug}/{color-slug} — Individual color page with hex, RGB, LRV, undertone, cross-brand matches, complementary colors, and palettes
- /match/{source-brand}/to/{target-brand} — Top 50 cross-brand color matches between two brands
- /search — Search colors by name, number, or hex code
- /compare — Side-by-side color comparison tool
- /tools/room-visualizer — Preview paint colors in a room
- /tools/color-identifier — Upload a photo and identify paint colors
- /tools/palette-generator — Generate coordinated color palettes
- /tools/paint-calculator — Calculate how much paint you need
- /faq — Frequently asked questions about paint colors
- /blog — Articles about paint colors, trends, and guides
- /guides — Data-driven paint guides with real color recommendations
- /guides/best-paint-colors-north-facing-rooms — Colors for north-facing rooms (warm undertones, high LRV)
- /guides/best-paint-colors-east-facing-rooms — Colors for east-facing rooms (balance morning/afternoon light)
- /guides/best-nursery-paint-colors — Safe, calming nursery colors by category
- /guides/best-bedroom-paint-colors — Restful bedroom colors backed by color psychology
- /guides/best-home-office-paint-colors — Focus and productivity colors, video call tips
- /guides/paint-sheen-guide — Flat vs eggshell vs satin vs semi-gloss comparison

## Common Questions This Site Answers

- What is the Benjamin Moore equivalent of Sherwin-Williams Agreeable Gray?
- What undertone does [color name] have?
- How much paint do I need for a room?
- What are the best paint colors for kitchens/bedrooms/bathrooms?
- What is the hex code for [color name]?
- What is the closest Behr match to [any color]?
- What does LRV mean and why does it matter?
- What is the difference between paint sheens?

## API Note

This site does not offer a public API. All color data is available through the website pages listed above.
